title: ruellia viscosissima
intro: Ruellia viscosissima, also known as sticky ruellia, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a member of the Acanthaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as expectorant, bronchodilator, and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Ruellia viscosissima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
